overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character ascending a concrete stairwell and exploring an indoor museum-like exhibition hall. The character walks through corridors into a spacious area with display cases, signage reading 'STARMAP TOURS', and other NPC visitors, eventually stopping to examine an artifact display.

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete stairs in a narrow enclosed stairwell

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase ascending between walls
silver metal handrail running along the right side of the stairs
gray concrete walls with horizontal panel lines
long rectangular ceiling lights illuminating the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete stairwell in a narrow enclosed space with metal handrails and overhead fluorescent lighting. The environment is industrial with gray concrete walls, and no other people are present.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor with red wall panels

events.description: approaching the doorway leading to the exhibition hall

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor toward the exhibition space

entered.detail: arched doorway at the end of the corridor leading to a brighter space
red painted wall panels with metallic trim
light colored tile flooring in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow corridor with red wall panels and tiled flooring, approaching an arched doorway that leads to a larger exhibition space ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: museum exhibition hall with starmap tours

events.description: exits corridor and enters the large exhibition hall with display cases
other NPC visitors become visible standing near displays and kiosks

agents.ego_description: walking through the exhibition hall past glass display cases and other visitors

entered.detail: spacious open floor with wooden tile pattern
illuminated sign reading STARMAP TOURS above a large display
long glass display cases with artifacts on black pedestals
staircase leading to an upper level

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious exhibition hall with a STARMAP TOURS sign visible in the background. The space features glass display cases with artifacts, information kiosks, and a few NPC visitors standing around. The character walks past the displays toward the back of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: artifact display area with wall-mounted cases

events.description: character stops walking and stands before a display case to examine the artifact

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping at a specific display case to examine the artifacts inside

entered.detail: glass display case mounted against the wall with spotlit artifacts
black pedestals holding spherical and geometric artifacts
blank digital screen on a stand near the display

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wall-mounted display case containing artifacts on pedestals, slows down, and stops to examine the items. The area features spotlit displays and an interactive information screen to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile industrial stairwell into a brightly lit, public museum exhibition. It begins with the character ascending a concrete stairwell enclosed by gray walls and fluorescent lighting, moving upward through the narrow space. As the character reaches the top, the environment shifts into a corridor defined by red wall panels and tiled flooring, leading directly toward an arched doorway. The scene then opens into a spacious exhibition hall featuring glass display cases and a STARMAP TOURS sign, where the camera glides past information kiosks and other visitors. Finally, the movement slows as the character approaches a spotlit wall-mounted display, coming to a complete stop to examine artifacts on pedestals beside an interactive screen.
